result.final_summary: Both resolution and escalation branches encountered errors due to missing essential information. No ticket ID or search criteria were provided to either agent. The Triage Agent failed to produce a structured response, preventing normal ticket processing. Both agents requested clarification on ticket ID and request details before proceeding. No actions could be taken without these required parameters.

output.summary: Cannot resolve ticket without ticket ID or search criteria provided.
Cannot escalate without ticket ID or request details; Triage Agent failed to produce structured response and no fallback context was provided.
actions_taken: Requested clarification on ticket ID and request type
Unable to proceed without essential escalation parameters
